title: Experiment Plan v1
description: Schema for an experiment plan within the Tribunus Inference Research Evidence Plane. Defines the design, hypotheses, workloads, metrics, and policies for a comparative inference experiment.

experiment_id.description: Unique identifier for this experiment plan.

hypothesis.description: Formal statement of the hypothesis being tested.

optimization_id.description: Identifier of the optimization this experiment evaluates.

workloads.description: List of workload identifiers to execute.

machine_profile_id.description: Identifier of the target machine profile.

run_grade.description: Minimum run grade required for this experiment.

primary_metric.description: Identifier of the primary evaluation metric.

correctness_requirements.description: List of correctness requirements or constraints.

min_repetitions.description: Minimum number of repetitions per workload.

run_ordering.description: Ordering strategy for baseline and treatment runs.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wall-clock time per run in seconds.

memory_ceiling_bytes.description: Maximum memory usage allowed per run.

outlier_policy.description: Policy for handling outlier runs (e.g. discard, flag, retain).

promotion_threshold.description: Threshold at which a treatment is considered promotable over baseline.

known_risks.description: Known risks or caveats for this experiment.
